query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE status = 'published') as total_published,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE content LIKE '%anrdoezrs.net%' AND status = 'published') as with_cj_links,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE content LIKE '%24-7pressrelease%' AND status = 'published') as with_press_release_links,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE content LIKE '%amazon.com%' AND status = 'published') as with_amazon_links;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mexMZK3NDs3KsAz.c9d58c93f039 --database RymVrvaM7i66nf7Xs2w9Hu --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE status = 'published') as total_published,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE content LIKE '%anrdoezrs.net%' AND status = 'published') as with_cj_links,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE content LIKE '%24-7pressrelease%' AND status = 'published') as with_press_release_links,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE content LIKE '%amazon.com%' AND status = 'published') as with_amazon_links;
